symbols.name: IndexStore
symbols.docstring: Manages per-file JSON indexes in the .semantic-tool/index/ directory.

symbols.name: save
symbols.docstring:
Save a FileIndex to disk.

        Maps source path to index path:
            src/auth/service.py -> .semantic-tool/index/src/auth/service.py.json

symbols.name: load
symbols.docstring: Load the index for a source file, or None if not indexed.

symbols.name: is_stale
symbols.docstring:
Check if the index is stale (file changed or not indexed).

        Returns True if the file needs re-indexing.

symbols.name: list_indexed_files
symbols.docstring: List all source files that have been indexed.

symbols.name: remove
symbols.docstring: Remove the index for a source file.

symbols.name: _source_to_index_path
symbols.docstring: Map source file path to .semantic-tool/index/... path.

symbols.name: save_transaction
symbols.docstring: Write a transaction as JSONL. First line is header, rest are edits/renames.

symbols.name: load_transaction
symbols.docstring: Load a transaction from JSONL. Returns (header, edits, file_rename) or None.

symbols.name: compute_file_hash
symbols.docstring: SHA-256 hash of a file's contents.
